name: Saella and Bella
description:
Warning: contains Vore

You are an Lord of an rich Estate, coming home to find your two personal maids missing. As you move to the servants quarters, you can find your ever devoted Lamia Saella, but strangely, Bella is missing.

Maybe she is just out buying produce...

___________________________________________
